body: cycle-2 reframe per review-spec-2026-05-25.md: shifted ac-02..ac-05 scope source from unfielded adjacent_files to agent-typed (substrate the agent already reads); added smoke-marker verification clause to ac-02..ac-05; hardened ac-04 PR-diff resolution (gh first, git fallback, bypass on failure); ac-07 lead flipped to retain-as-backstop (610/0 doesn't decompose pipeline-vs-ad-hoc); ac-08 gains per-repo pre-ship baselines captured BEFORE the first edit; ac-01 gains skill-tool return contract and the new hook lead; ac-06 explicitly docs-only

cycle-3 reframe per review-spec-2026-05-25-v2.md: replaced dead-substrate refs (progress.md/session-card) with orbit-spec-note + orbit-memory-remember; removed incoherent ac-07 path-filter clause (kept warning-text sharpening only); dropped circular Q1-Q5 scope derivation from ac-03 (cards refs[] alone); added retrieval-method note to ac-08 (orbit memory list | grep, not memory search); added args-drop guard to ac-01 and cross-check verifications in ac-02..ac-05 (write intended scope to note/memory BEFORE the Skill call to catch args drops in-cycle)

cycle-3 disposition: per-AC pick applied to ac-02 + ac-01 mirror; smoke verification updated to pair N AC scope-lines against N marker entry-sets; deviated from synthetic-BLOCK mechanical rule (monotonic convergence pattern, not no-progress pattern); proceeding to implement stage
